---
title: "Frances Maria Wilbraham"
---

## Frances Maria Wilbraham

**Dates:** (1816- 26 June 1905)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1860-85)

### Biography

She was the fifth of seven daughters (there were also four sons);  she was living in Chester with her mother and sisters in the 1861 and with her sisters in the 1881 census; a friend of Mrs Moberly;  she contributed to CMY’s <i>Musings over the Christian Year</i>. Her brother Richard Wilbraham was governor of the Royal Victoria Hospital, Netley. [LG 1906 Wilbraham of Delamere]

### Letters

- Letter from July 2, 1881.
- Letter from Oct 24th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from March 25th [1867]
- Letter from Jan. 3. 1867
- Letter from Jan 31st 1866
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from Aug 17th [1864]
- Letter from Nov 3d 1860
- Letter from July 11th 1859

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
